Agent.description: A registered AI agent within the Operan platform, identified by a unique UUID and associated with a tenant.

role.description: The functional role the agent fills within the platform.

tenant_id.description: UUID of the tenant that owns this agent.

capabilities.description: List of capabilities the agent provides.

tools.description: List of tool identifiers the agent can invoke.

memory_access.description: Configuration for the agent's memory access permissions.

escalation_rules.description: Rules governing when and how the agent escalates tasks.

governance_policies.description: Governance policies that apply to this agent.

version.description: Semantic version of the agent's current configuration.

dependencies.description: List of agent UUIDs this agent depends on.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the agent was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the agent was last updated.

created_by.description: UUID of the user or system that created the agent.

CreateAgentRequest.description: Request payload for creating a new agent.

role.description: The functional role the agent will fill.

tenant_id.description: UUID of the tenant that will own the agent.

capabilities.description: List of capabilities the agent provides.

tools.description: List of tool identifiers the agent can invoke.

memory_access.description: Configuration for the agent's memory access permissions.

escalation_rules.description: Rules governing when and how the agent escalates tasks.

governance_policies.description: Governance policies that apply to this agent.

description.description: Additional description of the agent's purpose.

UpdateAgentRequest.description: Request payload for updating an existing agent. All fields are optional; only provided fields will be modified.

role.description: The functional role the agent fills.

capabilities.description: List of capabilities the agent provides.

tools.description: List of tool identifiers the agent can invoke.

memory_access.description: Configuration for the agent's memory access permissions.

escalation_rules.description: Rules governing when and how the agent escalates tasks.

governance_policies.description: Governance policies that apply to this agent.

status.description: New lifecycle status for the agent.

description.description: Additional description of the agent's purpose.

CapabilityIndex.description: Describes a specific capability offered by an agent, including its version, tooling, and performance characteristics.

required_tools.description: List of tools required to execute this capability.

memory_scope.description: List of memory stores or scopes this capability can access.

supported_languages.description: List of language identifiers this capability supports.

CostProfile.description: Defines the cost and budget parameters for an agent or capability.

cost_per_execution.description: Fixed cost incurred each time the agent is executed.

estimated_monthly_cost.description: Estimated monthly cost based on projected usage.

budget_limit.description: Maximum budget limit for the agent.

throttle_threshold.description: Threshold (0.0 to 1.0) at which the agent should be throttled.

AgentDependency.description: Describes a dependency relationship between two agents.

agent_id.description: UUID of the agent that has the dependency.

dependency_id.description: UUID of the agent being depended upon.

type.description: Nature of the dependency: required, optional, or resolved at runtime.

active.description: Whether this dependency is currently active.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the dependency was created.

AgentVersion.description: Represents a versioned snapshot of an agent's configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier for this agent version.

agent_id.description: UUID of the agent this version belongs to.

version.description: Semantic version of this agent configuration.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this version was created.

created_by.description: UUID of the user or system that created this version.

change_summary.description: Summary of changes in this version.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this agent version.

diff_from_previous.description: Detailed diff or description of changes from the previous version.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error response format for API requests.
